title: carex alba
intro: Carex alba, also known as White Sedge or White-Edged Sedge, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to Europe and North America. The plant's rhizome and roots contain compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Carex alba include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, as well as its possible role in supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. Carex alba can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal applications.
